title: Trachymene microcephala
taxonomy: Trachymene microcephala is classified within the family Apiaceae, commonly known as the carrot or parsley family. This plant is a type of herbaceous perennial or annual, native to Australia. The genus Trachymene is part of the tribe Apieae, and it is closely related to the genus Oligospermum. Trachymene microcephala is also classified as a species within the genus Trachymene. Its classification is further supported by its characteristic leaf morphology and reproductive structures.
uses: Trachymene microcephala has been traditionally used by Indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties.
